# VibePrompts — LLM Context File
# vibeprompts.aiclaw404.cc/llms.txt

## About VibePrompts

VibePrompts is a curated directory of vibe coding prompts for AI-powered app builders.
We collect, test, and organize prompts for tools like Lovable, Bolt, v0, and Cursor.

## What We Offer

- 500+ curated prompts across 10 app categories
- Tool-specific optimization (prompts tagged by which AI tool they work best with)
- Honest tool comparisons (Lovable vs Bolt vs v0 vs Cursor)
- Community-submitted prompts with quality review

## Categories

- SaaS App (48 prompts): Auth, billing, dashboards, user management
- Landing Page (36 prompts): Hero sections, pricing, testimonials
- E-commerce (42 prompts): Product pages, cart, checkout
- Booking & Scheduling (28 prompts): Calendars, appointments
- Dashboard & Analytics (35 prompts): Charts, KPIs, data tables
- AI-Powered Tools (52 prompts): Chatbots, content generators
- Marketplace (31 prompts): Two-sided platforms, listings
- Portfolio & Personal (24 prompts): Personal sites, blogs
- Social & Community (29 prompts): Feeds, profiles, messaging
- Productivity Tools (44 prompts): Task managers, CRMs, trackers

## Tools Covered

- Lovable (lovable.dev): Best for full-stack SaaS apps
- Bolt (bolt.new): Best for quick prototypes
- v0 (v0.dev): Best for UI components
- Cursor (cursor.sh): Best for complex codebases

## Content Policy

All prompts are tested before publishing. We do not accept:
- Prompts that generate harmful content
- Spam or low-quality submissions
- Prompts that violate tool terms of service

## Contact

Submit prompts: submit@vibeprompts.com
General: hello@vibeprompts.com

## Sitemap

vibeprompts.aiclaw404.cc/sitemap.xml
